title: Immersed
description: Improved ambience, visuals, progression, and more
body:
Immersed is a modpack that subtly improves everything in the base game, from terrain generation to generated structures, exploration to creative building, and even just small quality-of-life things.

You can find the complete mod list when you click on the latest version under the versions tab in this project.


Included are also three shaders with distinctly different styles. Choose Eclipse for a more realistic style with accurate shadows and lighting, and Photon for slightly more forgiving framerates but a nonetheless stunning look. Complementary Reimagined + Euphoria Patches is also great for people who prefer a more vanilla look, but has incredible lighting and effects nonetheless.

Having terrible performance? \
Head into Options -> Video settings -> and lower settings such as Voxy render distance and simulation distance to your liking. Disabling shaders will massively increase your performance as well.

Vanilla Tweaks and Eclipse shader are copyrighted, so [here](https://vanillatweaks.net/) and [here](https://github.com/Merlin1809/Eclipse-Shader) is the attribution!


This modpack is free to distribute and expand upon as a template. After all, it's just a bunch of mods, why would you need to give credit?

THIS IS NOT AN OFFICIAL MINECRAFT PRODUCT. IT IS NOT APPROVED BY OR ASSOCIATED WITH EITHER MOJANG OR MICROSOFT.
